title: Return of the Jedi 2
content:

'''''Return of the Jedi'' 2''' is the second issue of the [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] miniseries [[Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (1983)|''Star Wars: Return of the Jedi'']], which adapts the [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|film]] of the same name. Based on a screenplay by [[Lawrence Kasdan]] and [[George Lucas]], it was adapted by [[Archie Goodwin]], illustrated by [[Al Williamson]] and [[Carlos Garzón]], and first published by [[Marvel Comics]] in [[November]] [[1983]]. The issue features the story "'''The Emperor Commands'''," which opens with the [[Battle of the Great Pit of Carkoon]].

==Publisher's summary==
''Luke Skywalker returns to Dagobah while Emperor Palpatine plots to bring him to the dark side of the Force.''

==Plot summary==
{{Plot-link|Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi}}

==Continuity==
This issue includes a [[Content cut from Star Wars|scene cut]] from the original film, featuring [[Leia Skywalker Organa Solo|Princess Leia]] attacking a [[Unidentified deck gunner|deck gunner]] preparing to fire on the [[Bantha-II cargo skiff/Legends|skiff]] carrying [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] and [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]].<ref name="Topps ROTJ 52">{{Topps|set=1983 Topps Star Wars: Return of the Jedi Series 1|cardname=Princess Leia Swings Into Action!|link=https://www.tcdb.com/ViewCard.cfm/sid/72969/cid/5256902/1983-Topps-Return-Of-The-Jedi-52-Princess-Leia-Swings-Into-Action!}}</ref> A panel of Leia struggling to reach a nearby blaster pistol while chained to Jabba's body, another cut scene, is also included.<ref name="Making ROTJ">''[[The Making of Return of the Jedi]]''</ref>
